proman.views.tree.name: Project Tree
proman.viewsWelcome:
No tasks in the tree.
[Import MD](command:proman.importPlanningDocs)
[Add task](command:proman.addRootTask)
[Agent drives the tree](command:proman.driveTree)

Click — details. Right-click — subtask / delete / run one task in Agent.
Drive Mode: the agent walks the queue and writes statuses; structure changes only after your Approve.
